title: Looking for an Evangelion 01 Model kit
display_title: Looking for an Evangelion 01 Model kit
wikitext:
[]: Looking for an Evangelion 01 Model kit             Quote Post by DeusJGer » Sat May 26, 2012 1:37 am Hi everyone. I am new to this forum and this is my first post. Right now I cannot decide which one to get between two models. 1) Evangelion-01 New Movie Version http://www.1999.co.jp/eng/10059981 2) Evangelion Extra-Finish http://www.1999.co.jp/eng/10046596 Yes, I have watched many reviews about the New Movie model on Youtube. It is really awesome!! However there is nothing about the Extra Finish version. Only thing I know is that it has more stunning and realistic armour paint. Does anyone here have idea which one is better to purchase? Also do I need to worry about joint problem or hard-to-stand problem? Thanks in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat May 26, 2012 7:19 am I dunno about those two, but I heard people say good things about the Rebuild bandai kit

[]:             Quote Post by DeusJGer » Sat May 26, 2012 4:49 pm Good to know. but seems right now the new movie version is sold out in every online store I can find. During the memorial day sale, i can get the Extra Finish version for $68 on Robot4less.com Is the website legitimate?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat May 26, 2012 11:46 pm All those special coating versions are fucking evil because very, very few kits are actually designed for it and Bandai does it to squeeze out extra profit. The reason there's no reviews is because most people know to stay away. Get the Rebuild kit, but get the 2.0 version since it improves the torso http://www.1999.co.jp/eng/10114202

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun May 27, 2012 4:29 am http://www.hlj.com/product/BAN963116 This one seems to be still in stock. And the kit is only 2 years old, too!
